Operation 'text_detect_request' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Summary is wordy and not action-oriented. Description lacks clarity about output format and use case context. Enhanced version specifies language code format consistency with API documentation and explains when this operation is useful for AI agents deciding whether to call it.

data.current_summary: Detects the language for the provided text
data.current_description: Send source text in request body and receive JSON response with the detected language code.
data.description_suggestion: Analyzes provided text to automatically detect its source language. Accepts text in the request body and returns the detected language code in ISO 639-1 format (or ISO-639-2/BCP-47 for certain languages). Useful for determining source language when unknown before translation.
data.reasoning: Summary is wordy and not action-oriented. Description lacks clarity about output format and use case context. Enhanced version specifies language code format consistency with API documentation and explains when this operation is useful for AI agents deciding whether to call it.

message: Operation 'json_post_request' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate. Description needs enhancement to clarify required input parameters (source language, target languages), expected request structure, and that multiple target languages are supported in one request. This helps AI agents understand what parameters to provide and how to structure requests.

data.current_description: Send source JSON in request body  and receive JSON response with translations in multiple target languages. JSON values are translated while keys are left unchanged.
data.description_suggestion: Translates JSON payload values from a source language to one or more target languages. Accepts JSON object in request body with source language and target language(s) specified. Returns translated JSON with original structure preserved - only values are translated while keys remain unchanged. Supports multiple target languages in a single request.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate. Description needs enhancement to clarify required input parameters (source language, target languages), expected request structure, and that multiple target languages are supported in one request. This helps AI agents understand what parameters to provide and how to structure requests.

message: Operation 'get_languages' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context. Summary is clear. Description focuses on output format but lacks context about the operation's purpose and use case. Enhanced version explains the scope (90+ languages), why an AI agent would call this operation (to discover available language codes), and how the returned data is used in translation requests.

data.current_description: The list of languages returned includes language codes in `ISO 639-1`, `ISO-639-2` or `BCP-47` formats, as well as the human readable names of languages in English.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the complete list of 90+ languages supported by the Lecto Translation API for translation operations. Returns language information including language codes (ISO 639-1, ISO-639-2, or BCP-47 formats) and human-readable English names. Use this operation to discover available language codes for source and target language parameters in translation requests.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear. Description focuses on output format but lacks context about the operation's purpose and use case. Enhanced version explains the scope (90+ languages), why an AI agent would call this operation (to discover available language codes), and how the returned data is used in translation requests.

message: Operation 'text_post_request' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate but could be more specific. Description lacks critical input parameter details (source language, target languages, array format) and output structure information. Enhanced version clarifies the request structure, parameter requirements, response organization, and the efficiency benefit of supporting multiple target languages - all important for AI agents determining how to structure requests and process responses.

data.current_description: Send list of source texts in request body and receive JSON response with translations in multiple target languages.
data.description_suggestion: Translates one or more text strings or HTML content from a source language to one or more target languages in a single request. Accepts array of texts, source language code, and target language code(s) in request body. Returns JSON response with translated texts organized by target language. Supports multiple target languages simultaneously, enabling efficient batch translation operations.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but could be more specific. Description lacks critical input parameter details (source language, target languages, array format) and output structure information. Enhanced version clarifies the request structure, parameter requirements, response organization, and the efficiency benefit of supporting multiple target languages - all important for AI agents determining how to structure requests and process responses.
